case_title: CYRUS LA FARRE VS. BAY AREA TRANSMISSIONS & AUTO et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2011 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2011. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS WERE DETAINED BY THE COURT. MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2011 BY JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BAY AREA TRANSMISSIONS & AUTO POLLARD, CLAY HEARING SET FOR MAR-02-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-29-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JULY 29, 2011 - PARTIES PRESENT, MATTER WAS HEARD & ARGUED, AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED. BOTH PARTIES EXHIBITS RETAINED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2011 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED JAN-12-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT POLLARD, CLAY

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY CLAY POLLARD IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO APR-11-2011 AT 6:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CLAY POLLARD. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LA FARRE, CYRUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAY AREA TRANSMISSIONS & AUTO POLLARD, CLAY ONLY DEFENDANT: BAY AREA TRANSMISSION & AUTO'S EXHIBITS) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
